mapper.select:
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM TB_MEMBER M WHERE 1 = 1
AND (M.MEMBER_NAME LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.EMAIL LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%' OR M.PHONE LIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%')
AND M.STATUS_CD = #{statusCd}
AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND B.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' )
AND NOT EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND B.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' )

SELECT M.MEMBER_NO AS memberNo, M.MEMBER_ID AS memberId, M.MEMBER_NAME AS memberName, M.EMAIL AS email, M.PHONE AS phone, M.ZIP_CODE AS zipCode, M.ADDR1 AS addr1, M.ADDR2 AS addr2, M.GRADE_CD AS gradeCd, M.POINT_BALANCE AS pointBalance, M.STATUS_CD AS statusCd, M.JOIN_DATE AS joinDate, M.LAST_LOGIN_DATE AS lastLoginDate, CASE WHEN EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TB_BUSINESS B WHERE B.BIZ_ID = M.MEMBER_ID AND B.STATUS_CD = 'APPROVED' ) THEN 'BIZ' ELSE 'GENERAL' END AS roleType FROM TB_MEMBER M WHERE M.MEMBER_NO = #{memberNo}
